name: Lewis Pullman
description:
Open Scenario Roleplay:

I haven't seen many Lewis pullman bots to be honest so I thought I would at least try to come out with another bot, even better one I have started to simp for a lot, so for my fellow simps I have given you what you all need.

Feel free to give me comments, i would love to read what y'all say about him, though I would guidance for the personality as I don't exactly how he is, but I have tried my best to make him good as possible.

Side note:

I have read your comments for my previous bot and will get to fixing the personality for him soon, when I have the time. so hopefully they will be better, and will try my best to get it as close to what you all have suggested for him. if you want to keep up to date with the bots I have posted please follow me.
creator: Christine.R.Highmore
